ayahs.translation: In the name of Allah, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful.
[All] praise is [due] to Allah, Lord of the worlds -
The Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful,
Sovereign of the Day of Recompense.
It is You we worship and You we ask for help.
Guide us to the straight path -

ayahs.arabic: صِرَٰطَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ ٱلْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
ayahs.translation: The path of those upon whom You have bestowed favor, not of those who have evoked [Your] anger or of those who are astray.
About what are they asking one another?
About the great news -
That over which they are in disagreement.
No! They are going to know.
Then, no! They are going to know.
Have We not made the earth a resting place?
And the mountains as stakes?
And We created you in pairs
And made your sleep [a means for] rest
And made the night as clothing
And made the day for livelihood

ayahs.transliteration: Wa banaina fauqakum sab 'an shi daada
ayahs.translation: And constructed above you seven strong [heavens]
And made [therein] a burning lamp

ayahs.transliteration: Wa anzalna minal m'usiraati maa-an saj-jaaja
ayahs.translation: And sent down, from the rain clouds, pouring water

ayahs.transliteration: Linukh rija bihee habbaw wana baata
ayahs.translation: That We may bring forth thereby grain and vegetation
And gardens of entwined growth.
Indeed, the Day of Judgement is an appointed time -

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَتَأْتُونَ أَفْوَاجًۭا
ayahs.transliteration: Yauma yun fakhu fis-soori fataa toona afwaaja
ayahs.translation: The Day the Horn is blown and you will come forth in multitudes

ayahs.transliteration: Wa futiha tis samaa-u fakaanat abwaaba
ayahs.translation: And the heaven is opened and will become gateways

ayahs.transliteration: Wa suyyi raatil jibaalu fa kaanat saraaba
ayahs.translation: And the mountains are removed and will be [but] a mirage.
Indeed, Hell has been lying in wait
For the transgressors, a place of return,
In which they will remain for ages [unending].

ayahs.arabic: لَّا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا بَرْدًۭا وَلَا شَرَابًا
ayahs.transliteration: Laa ya zooqoona feeha bar daw walaa sharaaba
ayahs.translation: They will not taste therein [any] coolness or drink
Except scalding water and [foul] purulence -
An appropriate recompense.
Indeed, they were not expecting an account

ayahs.transliteration: Wa kazzabu bi aayaa tina kizzaba
ayahs.translation: And denied Our verses with [emphatic] denial.

ayahs.transliteration: Wa kulla shai-in ahsai naahu kitaa ba
ayahs.translation: But all things We have enumerated in writing.

ayahs.transliteration: Fa zooqoo falan-nazee dakum ill-laa azaaba
ayahs.translation: "So taste [the penalty], and never will We increase you except in torment."
Indeed, for the righteous is attainment -
Gardens and grapevines
And full-breasted [companions] of equal age
And a full cup.

ayahs.arabic: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًۭا وَلَا كِذَّٰبًۭا
ayahs.transliteration: Laa yasma'oona fiha lagh waw walaa kizzaba
ayahs.translation: No ill speech will they hear therein or any falsehood -
[As] reward from your Lord, [a generous] gift [made due by] account,

ayahs.arabic: رَّبِّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ۖ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِنْهُ خِطَابًۭا
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbis samaa waati wal ardi wa maa baina humar rahmaani laa yam likoona minhu khi taaba
ayahs.translation: [From] the Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Most Merciful. They possess not from Him [authority for] speech.

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ يَقُومُ ٱلرُّوحُ وَٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ صَفًّۭا ۖ لَّا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنُ وَقَالَ صَوَابًۭا
ayahs.transliteration: Yauma yaqoo mur roohu wal malaa-ikatu saf-fal laa yata kalla moona illa man azina lahur rahmaanu wa qaala sawaaba
ayahs.translation: The Day that the Spirit and the angels will stand in rows, they will not speak except for one whom the Most Merciful permits, and he will say what is correct.

ayahs.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ مَـَٔابًا
ayahs.transliteration: Zaalikal yaumul haqqu faman shaa-at ta khaaza ill-laa rabbihi ma-aaba
ayahs.translation: That is the True Day; so he who wills may take to his Lord a [way of] return.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّآ أَنذَرْنَٰكُمْ عَذَابًۭا قَرِيبًۭا يَوْمَ يَنظُرُ ٱلْمَرْءُ مَا قَدَّمَتْ يَدَاهُ وَيَقُولُ ٱلْكَافِرُ يَٰلَيْتَنِى كُنتُ تُرَٰبًۢا
ayahs.transliteration: In naa anzar naakum azaaban qareebaiy-yauma yan zurul marr-u maa qaddamat yadaahu wa ya qoolul-kaafiru yaa lai tanee kuntu turaaba
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We have warned you of a near punishment on the Day when a man will observe what his hands have put forth and the disbeliever will say, "Oh, I wish that I were dust!"
By those [angels] who extract with violence
And [by] those who remove with ease
And [by] those who glide [as if] swimming
And those who race each other in a race
And those who arrange [each] matter,
On the Day the blast [of the Horn] will convulse [creation],
There will follow it the subsequent [one].
Hearts, that Day, will tremble,
Their eyes humbled.

ayahs.transliteration: Ya qoo loona a-inna lamar doo doona fil haafirah
ayahs.translation: They are [presently] saying, "Will we indeed be returned to [our] former state [of life]?
Even if we should be decayed bones?
They say, "That, then, would be a losing return."
Indeed, it will be but one shout,
And suddenly they will be [alert] upon the earth's surface.
Has there reached you the story of Moses? -

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ نَادَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ بِٱلْوَادِ ٱلْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى
ayahs.transliteration: Iz nadaahu rabbuhu bil waadil-muqad dasi tuwa
ayahs.translation: When his Lord called to him in the sacred valley of Tuwa,
"Go to Pharaoh. Indeed, he has transgressed.

ayahs.arabic: فَقُلْ هَل لَّكَ إِلَىٰٓ أَن تَزَكَّىٰ
ayahs.translation: And say to him, 'Would you [be willing to] purify yourself

ayahs.transliteration: Wa ahdi yaka ila rabbika fatakh sha
ayahs.translation: And let me guide you to your Lord so you would fear [Him]?'"
And he showed him the greatest sign,
But Pharaoh denied and disobeyed.
Then he turned his back, striving.
And he gathered [his people] and called out
And said, "I am your most exalted lord."

ayahs.transliteration: Fa-akha zahul laahu nakalal aakhirati wal-oola.
ayahs.translation: So Allah seized him in exemplary punishment for the last and the first [transgression].

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبْرَةًۭ لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰٓ
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a warning for whoever would fear [Allah].

ayahs.arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَمِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ ۚ بَنَىٰهَا
ayahs.transliteration: A-antum a shaddu khalqan amis samaa-u banaaha.
ayahs.translation: Are you a more difficult creation or is the heaven? Allah constructed it.
He raised its ceiling and proportioned it.

ayahs.transliteration: Wa aghtasha lailaha wa akhraja duhaaha.
ayahs.translation: And He darkened its night and extracted its brightness.
And after that He spread the earth.
He extracted from it its water and its pasture,
And the mountains He set firmly
As provision for you and your grazing livestock.
But when there comes the greatest Overwhelming Calamity -

ayahs.transliteration: Yauma Yata zakkarul insaanu ma sa'aa.
ayahs.translation: The Day when man will remember that for which he strove,
And Hellfire will be exposed for [all] those who see -
So as for he who transgressed
And preferred the life of the world,
Then indeed, Hellfire will be [his] refuge.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ وَنَهَى ٱلنَّفْسَ عَنِ ٱلْهَوَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa ammaa man khaafa maqaama Rabbihee wa nahan nafsa 'anil hawaa
ayahs.translation: But as for he who feared the position of his Lord and prevented the soul from [unlawful] inclination,
Then indeed, Paradise will be [his] refuge.
They ask you, [O Muhammad], about the Hour: when is its arrival?
In what [position] are you that you should mention it?
To your Lord is its finality.
You are only a warner for those who fear it.

ayahs.arabic: كَأَنَّهُمْ يَوْمَ يَرَوْنَهَا لَمْ يَلْبَثُوٓا۟ إِلَّا عَشِيَّةً أَوْ ضُحَىٰهَا
ayahs.transliteration: Ka annahum Yawma yarawnahaa lam yalbasooo illaa 'ashiyyatan aw duhaahaa
ayahs.translation: It will be, on the Day they see it, as though they had not remained [in the world] except for an afternoon or a morning thereof.
The Prophet frowned and turned away
Because there came to him the blind man, [interrupting].

ayahs.transliteration: Wa maa yudreeka la'allahu yaz zakkaa.
ayahs.translation: But what would make you perceive, [O Muhammad], that perhaps he might be purified

ayahs.transliteration: Au yaz zak karu fatanfa 'ahuz zikraa.
ayahs.translation: Or be reminded and the remembrance would benefit him?
As for he who thinks himself without need,
To him you give attention.
And not upon you [is any blame] if he will not be purified.
But as for he who came to you striving [for knowledge]
While he fears [Allah],
From him you are distracted.
No! Indeed, these verses are a reminder;
So whoever wills may remember it.
[It is recorded] in honored sheets,
Exalted and purified,
[Carried] by the hands of messenger-angels,
Noble and dutiful.
Cursed is man; how disbelieving is he.
From what substance did He create him?
From a sperm-drop He created him and destined for him;
Then He eased the way for him;
Then He causes his death and provides a grave for him.
Then when He wills, He will resurrect him.
No! Man has not yet accomplished what He commanded him.
Then let mankind look at his food -
How We poured down water in torrents,
Then We broke open the earth, splitting [it with sprouts],
And caused to grow within it grain
And grapes and herbage
And olive and palm trees
And gardens of dense shrubbery
And fruit and grass -
[As] enjoyment for you and your grazing livestock.
But when there comes the Deafening Blast
On the Day a man will flee from his brother
And his mother and his father
And his wife and his children,

ayahs.arabic: لِكُلِّ ٱمْرِئٍۢ مِّنْهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ شَأْنٌۭ يُغْنِيهِ
ayahs.translation: For every man, that Day, will be a matter adequate for him.
[Some] faces, that Day, will be bright -
Laughing, rejoicing at good news.
And [other] faces, that Day, will have upon them dust.
Blackness will cover them.
Those are the disbelievers, the wicked ones.
When the sun is wrapped up [in darkness]
And when the stars fall, dispersing,
And when the mountains are removed
And when full-term she-camels are neglected
And when the wild beasts are gathered
And when the seas are filled with flame
And when the souls are paired
And when the girl [who was] buried alive is asked
For what sin she was killed
And when the pages are made public
And when the sky is stripped away
And when Hellfire is set ablaze
And when Paradise is brought near,
A soul will [then] know what it has brought [with it].
So I swear by the retreating stars -
Those that run [their courses] and disappear -
And by the night as it closes in
And by the dawn when it breathes
[That] indeed, the Qur'an is a word [conveyed by] a noble messenger

ayahs.arabic: ذِى قُوَّةٍ عِندَ ذِى ٱلْعَرْشِ مَكِينٍۢ
ayahs.translation: [Who is] possessed of power and with the Owner of the Throne, secure [in position],
Obeyed there [in the heavens] and trustworthy.
And your companion is not [at all] mad.

ayahs.transliteration: Wa laqad ra aahu bilufuqil mubeen
ayahs.translation: And he has already seen Gabriel in the clear horizon.
And Muhammad is not a withholder of [knowledge of] the unseen.

ayahs.transliteration: Wa maa huwa biqawli shaitaanir rajeem
ayahs.translation: And the Qur'an is not the word of a devil, expelled [from the heavens].
So where are you going?
It is not except a reminder to the worlds
For whoever wills among you to take a right course.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa maa tashaaa'oona illaaa ai yashaaa 'al laahu Rabbul 'Aalameen
ayahs.translation: And you do not will except that Allah wills - Lord of the worlds.
When the sky breaks apart
And when the stars fall, scattering,
And when the seas are erupted
And when the [contents of] graves are scattered,
A soul will [then] know what it has put forth and kept back.

ayahs.arabic: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ ٱلْكَرِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: Yaaa ayyuhal insaaanu maa gharraka bi Rabbikal kareem
ayahs.translation: O mankind, what has deceived you concerning your Lord, the Generous,
Who created you, proportioned you, and balanced you?

ayahs.arabic: فِىٓ أَىِّ صُورَةٍۢ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَ
ayahs.transliteration: Feee ayye sooratim maa shaaa'a rakkabak
ayahs.translation: In whatever form He willed has He assembled you.
No! But you deny the Recompense.
And indeed, [appointed] over you are keepers,
Noble and recording;
They know whatever you do.
Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure,
And indeed, the wicked will be in Hellfire.
They will [enter to] burn therein on the Day of Recompense,
And never therefrom will they be absent.

ayahs.transliteration: Wa maaa adraaka maa Yawmud Deen
ayahs.translation: And what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ مَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
ayahs.transliteration: Summa maaa adraaka maa Yawmud Deen
ayahs.translation: Then, what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ لَا تَمْلِكُ نَفْسٌۭ لِّنَفْسٍۢ شَيْـًۭٔا ۖ وَٱلْأَمْرُ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لِّلَّهِ
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma laa tamliku nafsul linafsin shai'anw walamru yawma'izil lillaah
ayahs.translation: It is the Day when a soul will not possess for another soul [power to do] a thing; and the command, that Day, is [entirely] with Allah.
Woe to those who give less [than due],

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ٱكْتَالُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ يَسْتَوْفُونَ
ayahs.translation: Who, when they take a measure from people, take in full.

ayahs.transliteration: Wa izaa kaaloohum aw wazanoohum yukhsiroon
ayahs.translation: But if they give by measure or by weight to them, they cause loss.
Do they not think that they will be resurrected
For a tremendous Day -
The Day when mankind will stand before the Lord of the worlds?

ayahs.arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَٰبَ ٱلْفُجَّارِ لَفِى سِجِّينٍۢ
ayahs.transliteration: Kallaaa inna kitaabal fujjaari lafee Sijjeen
ayahs.translation: No! Indeed, the record of the wicked is in sijjeen.
And what can make you know what is sijjeen?
It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed.
Woe, that Day, to the deniers,
Who deny the Day of Recompense.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا كُلُّ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa maa yukazzibu biheee illaa kullu mu'tadin aseem
ayahs.translation: And none deny it except every sinful transgressor.

ayahs.arabic: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Izaa tutlaa'alaihi aayaatunaa qaala asaateerul awwaleen
ayahs.translation: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples."

ayahs.arabic: كَلَّا ۖ بَلْ ۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Kallaa bal raana 'alaa quloobihim maa kaanoo yaksiboon
ayahs.translation: No! Rather, the stain has covered their hearts of that which they were earning.

ayahs.arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ عَن رَّبِّهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لَّمَحْجُوبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Kallaaa innahum 'ar Rabbihim yawma'izil lamah jooboon
ayahs.translation: No! Indeed, from their Lord, that Day, they will be partitioned.
Then indeed, they will [enter and] burn in Hellfire.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Summa yuqaalu haazal lazee kuntum bihee tukazziboon
ayahs.translation: Then it will be said [to them], "This is what you used to deny."

ayahs.arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَٰبَ ٱلْأَبْرَارِ لَفِى عِلِّيِّينَ
ayahs.translation: No! Indeed, the record of the righteous is in 'illiyyun.
And what can make you know what is 'illiyyun?
It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed
Which is witnessed by those brought near [to Allah].
Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure
On adorned couches, observing.
You will recognize in their faces the radiance of pleasure.
They will be given to drink [pure] wine [which was] sealed.

ayahs.arabic: خِتَٰمُهُۥ مِسْكٌۭ ۚ وَفِى ذَٰلِكَ فَلْيَتَنَافَسِ ٱلْمُتَنَٰفِسُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Khitaamuhoo misk; wa fee zaalika falyatanaafasil Mutanaafisoon
ayahs.translation: The last of it is musk. So for this let the competitors compete.
And its mixture is of Tasneem,
A spring from which those near [to Allah] drink.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجْرَمُوا۟ كَانُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ يَضْحَكُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Innal lazeena ajramoo kaanoo minal lazeena aamanoo yadhakoon
ayahs.translation: Indeed, those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed.
And when they passed by them, they would exchange derisive glances.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِذَا ٱنقَلَبُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِمُ ٱنقَلَبُوا۟ فَكِهِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa izan qalabooo ilaaa ahlihimun qalaboo fakiheen
ayahs.translation: And when they returned to their people, they would return jesting.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِذَا رَأَوْهُمْ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَضَآلُّونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa izaa ra awhum qaalooo inna haaa'ulaaa'i ladaaal loon
ayahs.translation: And when they saw them, they would say, "Indeed, those are truly lost."
But they had not been sent as guardians over them.

ayahs.arabic: فَٱلْيَوْمَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْكُفَّارِ يَضْحَكُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fal yawmal lazeena aamanoo minal kuffaari yadhakoon
ayahs.translation: So Today those who believed are laughing at the disbelievers,
On adorned couches, observing.

ayahs.arabic: هَلْ ثُوِّبَ ٱلْكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُوا۟ يَفْعَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Hal suwwibal kuffaaru maa kaanoo yaf'aloon
ayahs.translation: Have the disbelievers [not] been rewarded [this Day] for what they used to do?
When the sky has split [open]

ayahs.transliteration: Wa azinat li Rabbihaa wa huqqat
ayahs.translation: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so]
And when the earth has been extended

ayahs.transliteration: Wa alqat maa feehaa wa takhallat
ayahs.translation: And has cast out that within it and relinquished [it]

ayahs.transliteration: Wa azinat li Rabbihaa wa huqqat
ayahs.translation: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so] -

ayahs.arabic: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ إِنَّكَ كَادِحٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ كَدْحًۭا فَمُلَٰقِيهِ
ayahs.transliteration: Yaaa ayyuhal insaanu innaka kaadihun ilaa Rabbika kad han famulaaqeeh
ayahs.translation: O mankind, indeed you are laboring toward your Lord with [great] exertion and will meet it.

ayahs.transliteration: Fa ammaa man ootiya kitaabahoo biyameenih
ayahs.translation: Then as for he who is given his record in his right hand,
He will be judged with an easy account
And return to his people in happiness.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ وَرَآءَ ظَهْرِهِۦ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa ammaa man ootiya kitaabahoo waraaa'a zahrih
ayahs.translation: But as for he who is given his record behind his back,
He will cry out for destruction
And [enter to] burn in a Blaze.
Indeed, he had [once] been among his people in happiness;
Indeed, he had thought he would never return [to Allah].

ayahs.arabic: بَلَىٰٓ إِنَّ رَبَّهُۥ كَانَ بِهِۦ بَصِيرًۭا
ayahs.transliteration: Balaaa inna Rabbahoo kaana bihee baseeraa
ayahs.translation: But yes! Indeed, his Lord was ever of him, Seeing.
So I swear by the twilight glow
And [by] the night and what it envelops
And [by] the moon when it becomes full
[That] you will surely experience state after state.
So what is [the matter] with them [that] they do not believe,

ayahs.arabic: وَإِذَا قُرِئَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْقُرْءَانُ لَا يَسْجُدُونَ ۩
ayahs.transliteration: Wa izaa quri'a 'alaihimul Quraanu laa yasjudoon
ayahs.translation: And when the Qur'an is recited to them, they do not prostrate [to Allah]?
But those who have disbelieved deny,
And Allah is most knowing of what they keep within themselves.
So give them tidings of a painful punishment,

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ لَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍۭ
ayahs.transliteration: Illal lazeena aamanoo wa 'amilus saalihaati lahum ajrun ghairu mamnoon
ayahs.translation: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds. For them is a reward uninterrupted.
By the sky containing great stars
And [by] the promised Day
And [by] the witness and what is witnessed,
Cursed were the companions of the trench
[Containing] the fire full of fuel,
When they were sitting near it

ayahs.arabic: وَهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَفْعَلُونَ بِٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ شُهُودٌۭ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa hum 'alaa maa yaf'aloona bilmu 'mineena shuhood
ayahs.translation: And they, to what they were doing against the believers, were witnesses.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا نَقَمُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ إِلَّآ أَن يُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَمِيدِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa maa naqamoo minhum illaaa aiyu'minoo billaahil 'azeezil Hameed
ayahs.translation: And they resented them not except because they believed in Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy,

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ شَهِيدٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Allazee lahoo mulkus samaawaati wal ard; wallaahu 'alaa kulli shai 'in Shaheed
ayahs.translation: To whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And Allah, over all things, is Witness.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ فَتَنُوا۟ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَٰتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَتُوبُوا۟ فَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ ٱلْحَرِيقِ
ayahs.transliteration: Innal lazeena fatanul mu'mineena wal mu'minaati summa lam yatooboo falahum 'azaabu Jahannama wa lahum 'azaabul hareeq
ayahs.translation: Indeed, those who have tortured the believing men and believing women and then have not repented will have the punishment of Hell, and they will have the punishment of the Burning Fire.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ لَهُمْ جَنَّٰتٌۭ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَٰرُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ
ayahs.transliteration: Innal lazeena aamanoo wa 'amilus saalihaati lahum Jannaatun tajree min tahtihal anhaar; zaalikal fawzul kabeer
ayahs.translation: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds will have gardens beneath which rivers flow. That is the great attainment.
Indeed, the vengeance of your Lord is severe.
Indeed, it is He who originates [creation] and repeats.
And He is the Forgiving, the Affectionate,
Honorable Owner of the Throne,
Effecter of what He intends.
Has there reached you the story of the soldiers -
[Those of] Pharaoh and Thamud?
But they who disbelieve are in [persistent] denial,
While Allah encompasses them from behind.
But this is an honored Qur'an
[Inscribed] in a Preserved Slate.
By the sky and the night comer -
And what can make you know what is the night comer?
It is the piercing star -

ayahs.arabic: إِن كُلُّ نَفْسٍۢ لَّمَّا عَلَيْهَا حَافِظٌۭ
ayahs.translation: There is no soul but that it has over it a protector.
So let man observe from what he was created.
He was created from a fluid, ejected,
Emerging from between the backbone and the ribs.
Indeed, Allah, to return him [to life], is Able.
The Day when secrets will be put on trial,

ayahs.arabic: فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن قُوَّةٍۢ وَلَا نَاصِرٍۢ
ayahs.transliteration: Famaa lahoo min quwwatinw wa laa naasir
ayahs.translation: Then man will have no power or any helper.
By the sky which returns [rain]
And [by] the earth which cracks open,
Indeed, the Qur'an is a decisive statement,
And it is not amusement.
Indeed, they are planning a plan,
But I am planning a plan.
So allow time for the disbelievers. Leave them awhile.
Exalt the name of your Lord, the Most High,
Who created and proportioned
And who destined and [then] guided
And who brings out the pasture
And [then] makes it black stubble.
We will make you recite, [O Muhammad], and you will not forget,

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ يَعْلَمُ ٱلْجَهْرَ وَمَا يَخْفَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Illaa maa shaaa'al laah; innahoo ya'lamul jahra wa maa yakhfaa
ayahs.translation: Except what Allah should will. Indeed, He knows what is declared and what is hidden.
And We will ease you toward ease.
So remind, if the reminder should benefit;
He who fears [Allah] will be reminded.
But the wretched one will avoid it -
[He] who will [enter and] burn in the greatest Fire,

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ لَا يَمُوتُ فِيهَا وَلَا يَحْيَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Summa laa yamootu feehaa wa laa yahyaa
ayahs.translation: Neither dying therein nor living.
He has certainly succeeded who purifies himself
And mentions the name of his Lord and prays.
But you prefer the worldly life,
While the Hereafter is better and more enduring.

ayahs.transliteration: Inna haazaa lafis suhu fil oolaa
ayahs.translation: Indeed, this is in the former scriptures,
The scriptures of Abraham and Moses.
Has there reached you the report of the Overwhelming [event]?
[Some] faces, that Day, will be humbled,
Working [hard] and exhausted.
They will [enter to] burn in an intensely hot Fire.
They will be given drink from a boiling spring.

ayahs.arabic: لَّيْسَ لَهُمْ طَعَامٌ إِلَّا مِن ضَرِيعٍۢ
ayahs.transliteration: Laisa lahum ta'aamun illaa min daree'
ayahs.translation: For them there will be no food except from a poisonous, thorny plant

ayahs.arabic: لَّا يُسْمِنُ وَلَا يُغْنِى مِن جُوعٍۢ
ayahs.transliteration: Laa yusminu wa laa yughnee min joo'
ayahs.translation: Which neither nourishes nor avails against hunger.
[Other] faces, that Day, will show pleasure.
With their effort [they are] satisfied
In an elevated garden,
Wherein they will hear no unsuitable speech.
Within it is a flowing spring.
Within it are couches raised high
And cups put in place
And cushions lined up
And carpets spread around.

ayahs.arabic: أَفَلَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَى ٱلْإِبِلِ كَيْفَ خُلِقَتْ
ayahs.translation: Then do they not look at the camels - how they are created?
And at the sky - how it is raised?
And at the mountains - how they are erected?
And at the earth - how it is spread out?
So remind, [O Muhammad]; you are only a reminder.
You are not over them a controller.
However, he who turns away and disbelieves -
Then Allah will punish him with the greatest punishment.
Indeed, to Us is their return.
Then indeed, upon Us is their account.
By the dawn
And [by] ten nights
And [by] the even [number] and the odd
And [by] the night when it passes,

ayahs.arabic: هَلْ فِى ذَٰلِكَ قَسَمٌۭ لِّذِى حِجْرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Hal fee zaalika qasamul lizee hijr
ayahs.translation: Is there [not] in [all] that an oath [sufficient] for one of perception?

ayahs.arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِعَادٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Alam tara kaifa fa'ala rabbuka bi'aad
ayahs.translation: Have you not considered how your Lord dealt with 'Aad -
[With] Iram - who had lofty pillars,

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّتِى لَمْ يُخْلَقْ مِثْلُهَا فِى ٱلْبِلَٰدِ
ayahs.transliteration: Allatee lam yukhlaq misluhaa fil bilaad
ayahs.translation: The likes of whom had never been created in the land?

ayahs.transliteration: Wa samoodal lazeena jaabus sakhra bil waad
ayahs.translation: And [with] Thamud, who carved out the rocks in the valley?
And [with] Pharaoh, owner of the stakes? -
[All of] whom oppressed within the lands
And increased therein the corruption.
So your Lord poured upon them a scourge of punishment.
Indeed, your Lord is in observation.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَأَكْرَمَهُۥ وَنَعَّمَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَكْرَمَنِ
ayahs.transliteration: Fa ammal insaanu izaa mab talaahu Rabbuhoo fa akramahoo wa na' 'amahoo fa yaqoolu Rabbeee akraman
ayahs.translation: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me."

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمَّآ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَهَٰنَنِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa ammaaa izaa mabtalaahu faqadara 'alaihi rizqahoo fa yaqoolu Rabbeee ahaanan
ayahs.translation: But when He tries him and restricts his provision, he says, "My Lord has humiliated me."

ayahs.transliteration: Kalla bal laa tukrimooo nal yateem
ayahs.translation: No! But you do not honor the orphan
And you do not encourage one another to feed the poor.
And you consume inheritance, devouring [it] altogether,
And you love wealth with immense love.

ayahs.arabic: كَلَّآ إِذَا دُكَّتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ دَكًّۭا دَكًّۭا
ayahs.transliteration: Kallaaa izaaa dukkatil ardu dakkan dakka
ayahs.translation: No! When the earth has been leveled - pounded and crushed -

ayahs.transliteration: Wa jaaa'a Rabbuka wal malaku saffan saffaa
ayahs.translation: And your Lord has come and the angels, rank upon rank,

ayahs.arabic: وَجِا۟ىٓءَ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِجَهَنَّمَ ۚ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa jeee'a yawma'izim bi jahannnam; Yawma 'iziny yatazakkarul insaanu wa annaa lahuz zikraa
ayahs.translation: And brought [within view], that Day, is Hell - that Day, man will remember, but what good to him will be the remembrance?
He will say, "Oh, I wish I had sent ahead [some good] for my life."

ayahs.transliteration: Fa Yawma izil laa yu'azzibu 'azaabahooo ahad
ayahs.translation: So on that Day, none will punish [as severely] as His punishment,

ayahs.transliteration: Wa laa yoosiqu wasaaqa hooo ahad
ayahs.translation: And none will bind [as severely] as His binding [of the evildoers].
[To the righteous it will be said], "O reassured soul,
Return to your Lord, well-pleased and pleasing [to Him],
And enter among My [righteous] servants
And enter My Paradise."
I swear by this city, Makkah -
And you, [O Muhammad], are free of restriction in this city -
And [by] the father and that which was born [of him],
We have certainly created man into hardship.

ayahs.arabic: أَيَحْسَبُ أَن لَّن يَقْدِرَ عَلَيْهِ أَحَدٌۭ
ayahs.translation: Does he think that never will anyone overcome him?
He says, "I have spent wealth in abundance."
Does he think that no one has seen him?
Have We not made for him two eyes?
And a tongue and two lips?
And have shown him the two ways?
But he has not broken through the difficult pass.
And what can make you know what is [breaking through] the difficult pass?
It is the freeing of a slave

ayahs.arabic: أَوْ إِطْعَٰمٌۭ فِى يَوْمٍۢ ذِى مَسْغَبَةٍۢ
ayahs.transliteration: Aw it'aamun fee yawmin zee masghabah
ayahs.translation: Or feeding on a day of severe hunger
An orphan of near relationship
Or a needy person in misery

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْمَرْحَمَةِ
ayahs.transliteration: Summa kaana minal lazeena aamanoo wa tawaasaw bissabri wa tawaasaw bilmarhamah
ayahs.translation: And then being among those who believed and advised one another to patience and advised one another to compassion.
Those are the companions of the right.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا هُمْ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْمَشْـَٔمَةِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wallazeena kafaroo bi aayaatinaa hum as-haabul Mash'amah
ayahs.translation: But they who disbelieved in Our signs - those are the companions of the left.
Over them will be fire closed in.
By the sun and its brightness
And [by] the moon when it follows it
And [by] the day when it displays it
And [by] the night when it covers it
And [by] the sky and He who constructed it
And [by] the earth and He who spread it
And [by] the soul and He who proportioned it
And inspired it [with discernment of] its wickedness and its righteousness,
He has succeeded who purifies it,
And he has failed who instills it [with corruption].
Thamud denied [their prophet] by reason of their transgression,
When the most wretched of them was sent forth.

ayahs.arabic: فَقَالَ لَهُمْ رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ نَاقَةَ ٱللَّهِ وَسُقْيَٰهَا
ayahs.transliteration: Faqaala lahum Rasoolul laahi naaqatal laahi wa suqiyaahaa
ayahs.translation: And the messenger of Allah [Salih] said to them, "[Do not harm] the she-camel of Allah or [prevent her from] her drink."

ayahs.arabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَعَقَرُوهَا فَدَمْدَمَ عَلَيْهِمْ رَبُّهُم بِذَنۢبِهِمْ فَسَوَّىٰهَا
ayahs.transliteration: Fakazzaboohu fa'aqaroohaa fadamdama 'alaihim Rabbuhum bizambihim fasaw waahaa
ayahs.translation: But they denied him and hamstrung her. So their Lord brought down upon them destruction for their sin and made it equal [upon all of them].
And He does not fear the consequence thereof.
By the night when it covers
And [by] the day when it appears

ayahs.transliteration: Wa maa khalaqaz zakara wal unthaa
ayahs.translation: And [by] He who created the male and female,
Indeed, your efforts are diverse.
As for he who gives and fears Allah
And believes in the best [reward],
We will ease him toward ease.
But as for he who withholds and considers himself free of need
And denies the best [reward],
We will ease him toward difficulty.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥٓ إِذَا تَرَدَّىٰٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa maa yughnee 'anhu maaluhooo izaa taraddaa
ayahs.translation: And what will his wealth avail him when he falls?
Indeed, [incumbent] upon Us is guidance.

ayahs.transliteration: Wa inna lanaa lal Aakhirata wal oolaa
ayahs.translation: And indeed, to Us belongs the Hereafter and the first [life].
So I have warned you of a Fire which is blazing.
None will [enter to] burn therein except the most wretched one.
Who had denied and turned away.
But the righteous one will avoid it -
[He] who gives [from] his wealth to purify himself

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا لِأَحَدٍ عِندَهُۥ مِن نِّعْمَةٍۢ تُجْزَىٰٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa maa li ahadin 'indahoo min ni'matin tujzaaa
ayahs.translation: And not [giving] for anyone who has [done him] a favor to be rewarded
But only seeking the countenance of his Lord, Most High.
And he is going to be satisfied.
By the morning brightness
And [by] the night when it covers with darkness,

ayahs.transliteration: Ma wad da'aka rabbuka wa ma qalaa
ayahs.translation: Your Lord has not taken leave of you, [O Muhammad], nor has He detested [you].
And the Hereafter is better for you than the first [life].

ayahs.transliteration: Wa la sawfa y'uteeka rabbuka fatarda
ayahs.translation: And your Lord is going to give you, and you will be satisfied.

ayahs.transliteration: Alam ya jidka yateeman fa aawaa
ayahs.translation: Did He not find you an orphan and give [you] refuge?

ayahs.transliteration: Wa wa jadaka daal lan fahada
ayahs.translation: And He found you lost and guided [you],
And He found you poor and made [you] self-sufficient.

ayahs.transliteration: Fa am mal yateema fala taqhar
ayahs.translation: So as for the orphan, do not oppress [him].

ayahs.transliteration: Wa am mas saa-ila fala tanhar
ayahs.translation: And as for the petitioner, do not repel [him].

ayahs.transliteration: Wa amma bi ni'mati rabbika fahad dith
ayahs.translation: But as for the favor of your Lord, report [it].
Did We not expand for you, [O Muhammad], your breast?
And We removed from you your burden
Which had weighed upon your back
And raised high for you your repute.
For indeed, with hardship [will be] ease.
Indeed, with hardship [will be] ease.
So when you have finished [your duties], then stand up [for worship].
And to your Lord direct [your] longing.
By the fig and the olive
And [by] Mount Sinai
And [by] this secure city [Makkah],

ayahs.arabic: لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ فِىٓ أَحْسَنِ تَقْوِيمٍۢ
ayahs.transliteration: Laqad khalaqnal insaana fee ahsani taqweem
ayahs.translation: We have certainly created man in the best of stature;

ayahs.transliteration: Thumma ra dad naahu asfala saafileen
ayahs.translation: Then We return him to the lowest of the low,

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ فَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍۢ
ayahs.transliteration: Ill-lal lazeena aamanoo wa 'amilus saalihaati; falahum ajrun ghairu mamnoon
ayahs.translation: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds, for they will have a reward uninterrupted.

ayahs.transliteration: Fama yu kaz zibuka b'adu bid deen
ayahs.translation: So what yet causes you to deny the Recompense?
Is not Allah the most just of judges?

ayahs.transliteration: Iqra bismi rab bikal lazee khalaq
ayahs.translation: Recite in the name of your Lord who created -
Created man from a clinging substance.
Recite, and your Lord is the most Generous -
Who taught by the pen -
Taught man that which he knew not.
No! [But] indeed, man transgresses
Because he sees himself self-sufficient.
Indeed, to your Lord is the return.
Have you seen the one who forbids
A servant when he prays?
Have you seen if he is upon guidance
Or enjoins righteousness?

ayahs.transliteration: Ara-aita in kaz zaba wa ta walla
ayahs.translation: Have you seen if he denies and turns away -

ayahs.transliteration: Alam y'alam bi-an nal lahaa yaraa
ayahs.translation: Does he not know that Allah sees?

ayahs.arabic: كَلَّا لَئِن لَّمْ يَنتَهِ لَنَسْفَعًۢا بِٱلنَّاصِيَةِ
ayahs.transliteration: Kalla la illam yantahi la nasfa'am bin nasiyah
ayahs.translation: No! If he does not desist, We will surely drag him by the forelock -
A lying, sinning forelock.
Then let him call his associates;
We will call the angels of Hell.
No! Do not obey him. But prostrate and draw near [to Allah].
Indeed, We sent the Qur'an down during the Night of Decree.

ayahs.transliteration: Wa maa adraaka ma lailatul qadr
ayahs.translation: And what can make you know what is the Night of Decree?

ayahs.arabic: لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ خَيْرٌۭ مِّنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍۢ
ayahs.transliteration: Lailatul qadri khairum min alfee shahr
ayahs.translation: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months.

ayahs.arabic: تَنَزَّلُ ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِم مِّن كُلِّ أَمْرٍۢ
ayahs.transliteration: Tanaz zalul malaa-ikatu war roohu feeha bi izni-rab bihim min kulli amr
ayahs.translation: The angels and the Spirit descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter.

ayahs.transliteration: Salaamun hiya hattaa mat la'il fajr
ayahs.translation: Peace it is until the emergence of dawn.

ayahs.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ مُنفَكِّينَ حَتَّىٰ تَأْتِيَهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ
ayahs.transliteration: Lam ya kunil lazeena kafaru min ahlil kitaabi wal mushri keena mun fak keena hattaa ta-tiya humul bayyinah
ayahs.translation: Those who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists were not to be parted [from misbelief] until there came to them clear evidence -

ayahs.arabic: رَسُولٌۭ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ يَتْلُوا۟ صُحُفًۭا مُّطَهَّرَةًۭ
ayahs.transliteration: Rasoolum minal laahi yatlu suhufam mutahharah
ayahs.translation: A Messenger from Allah, reciting purified scriptures
Within which are correct writings.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا تَفَرَّقَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا جَآءَتْهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa maa tafarraqal lazeena ootul kitaaba il-la mim b'adi ma jaa-at humul baiyyinah
ayahs.translation: Nor did those who were given the Scripture become divided until after there had come to them clear evidence.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أُمِرُوٓا۟ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ حُنَفَآءَ وَيُقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ دِينُ ٱلْقَيِّمَةِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa maa umiroo il-la liy'abu dul laaha mukhliseena lahud-deena huna faa-a wa yuqeemus salaahta wa yu-tuz zakaata; wa zaalika deenul qaiyimah
ayahs.translation: And they were not commanded except to worship Allah, [being] sincere to Him in religion, inclining to truth, and to establish prayer and to give zakah. And that is the correct religion.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ فِى نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمْ شَرُّ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
ayahs.transliteration: Innal lazeena kafaru min ahlil kitaabi wal mushri keena fee nari jahan nama khaali deena feeha; ulaa-ika hum shar rul ba reeyah
ayahs.translation: Indeed, they who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists will be in the fire of Hell, abiding eternally therein. Those are the worst of creatures.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمْ خَيْرُ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
ayahs.transliteration: Innal lazeena aamanu wa 'amilus saalihaati ula-ika hum khairul bareey yah
ayahs.translation: Indeed, they who have believed and done righteous deeds - those are the best of creatures.

ayahs.arabic: جَزَآؤُهُمْ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّٰتُ عَدْنٍۢ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًۭا ۖ رَّضِىَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ وَرَضُوا۟ عَنْهُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ لِمَنْ خَشِىَ رَبَّهُۥ
ayahs.transliteration: Jazaa-uhum inda rabbihim jan naatu 'adnin tajree min tahtihal an haaru khalideena feeha abada; radiy-yallaahu 'anhum wa ra du 'an zaalika liman khashiya rabbah.
ayahs.translation: Their reward with Allah will be gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever, Allah being pleased with them and they with Him. That is for whoever has feared his Lord.

ayahs.transliteration: Izaa zul zilatil ardu zil zaalaha
ayahs.translation: When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake
And the earth discharges its burdens
And man says, "What is [wrong] with it?" -
That Day, it will report its news
Because your Lord has commanded it.

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَئِذٍۢ يَصْدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ أَشْتَاتًۭا لِّيُرَوْا۟ أَعْمَٰلَهُمْ
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma iziy yas durun naasu ash tatal liyuraw a'maalahum
ayahs.translation: That Day, the people will depart separated [into categories] to be shown [the result of] their deeds.

ayahs.arabic: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيْرًۭا يَرَهُۥ
ayahs.transliteration: Famaiy ya'mal mithqala zarratin khai raiy-yarah
ayahs.translation: So whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it,

ayahs.arabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍۢ شَرًّۭا يَرَهُۥ
ayahs.translation: And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it.
By the racers, panting,
And the producers of sparks [when] striking
And the chargers at dawn,
Stirring up thereby [clouds of] dust,
Arriving thereby in the center collectively,
Indeed mankind, to his Lord, is ungrateful.
And indeed, he is to that a witness.

ayahs.transliteration: Wa innahu lihubbil khairi la shadeed
ayahs.translation: And indeed he is, in love of wealth, intense.

ayahs.arabic: ۞ أَفَلَا يَعْلَمُ إِذَا بُعْثِرَ مَا فِى ٱلْقُبُورِ
ayahs.transliteration: Afala ya'lamu iza b'uthira ma filquboor
ayahs.translation: But does he not know that when the contents of the graves are scattered
And that within the breasts is obtained,

ayahs.transliteration: Inna rabbahum bihim yauma 'izil la khabeer
ayahs.translation: Indeed, their Lord with them, that Day, is [fully] Acquainted.
The Striking Calamity -
What is the Striking Calamity?
And what can make you know what is the Striking Calamity?

ayahs.transliteration: Yauma ya koonun naasu kal farashil mabthooth
ayahs.translation: It is the Day when people will be like moths, dispersed,

ayahs.transliteration: Wa ta koonul jibalu kal 'ihnil manfoosh
ayahs.translation: And the mountains will be like wool, fluffed up.
Then as for one whose scales are heavy [with good deeds],
He will be in a pleasant life.

ayahs.transliteration: Wa amma man khaffat mawa zeenuh
ayahs.translation: But as for one whose scales are light,
His refuge will be an abyss.
And what can make you know what that is?
It is a Fire, intensely hot.
Competition in [worldly] increase diverts you
Until you visit the graveyards.
No! You are going to know.
Then no! You are going to know.
No! If you only knew with knowledge of certainty...
You will surely see the Hellfire.
Then you will surely see it with the eye of certainty.
Then you will surely be asked that Day about pleasure.
By time,
Indeed, mankind is in loss,

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ
ayahs.transliteration: Il lal lazeena aamanu wa 'amilus saali haati wa tawa saw bil haqqi wa tawa saw bis sabr
ayahs.translation: Except for those who have believed and done righteous deeds and advised each other to truth and advised each other to patience.
Woe to every scorner and mocker
Who collects wealth and [continuously] counts it.
He thinks that his wealth will make him immortal.

ayahs.transliteration: Kalla layum ba zanna fil hutamah
ayahs.translation: No! He will surely be thrown into the Crusher.
And what can make you know what is the Crusher?
It is the fire of Allah, [eternally] fueled,
Which mounts directed at the hearts.
Indeed, Hellfire will be closed down upon them
In extended columns.

ayahs.arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِأَصْحَٰبِ ٱلْفِيلِ
ayahs.transliteration: Alam tara kaifa fa'ala rabbuka bi ashaabil feel
ayahs.translation: Have you not considered, [O Muhammad], how your Lord dealt with the companions of the elephant?

ayahs.transliteration: Alam yaj'al kai dahum fee tad leel
ayahs.translation: Did He not make their plan into misguidance?
And He sent against them birds in flocks,

ayahs.transliteration: Tar meehim bi hi jaaratim min sij jeel
ayahs.translation: Striking them with stones of hard clay,
And He made them like eaten straw.
For the accustomed security of the Quraysh -
Their accustomed security [in] the caravan of winter and summer -
Let them worship the Lord of this House,

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٍۢ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنْ خَوْفٍۭ
ayahs.transliteration: Allazi at'amahum min ju'inw-wa-aamana hum min khawf
ayahs.translation: Who has fed them, [saving them] from hunger and made them safe, [saving them] from fear.

ayahs.transliteration: Ara-aital lazee yu kazzibu bid deen
ayahs.translation: Have you seen the one who denies the Recompense?
For that is the one who drives away the orphan

ayahs.transliteration: Wa la ya huddu 'alaa ta'amil miskeen
ayahs.translation: And does not encourage the feeding of the poor.
So woe to those who pray
[But] who are heedless of their prayer -
Those who make show [of their deeds]
And withhold [simple] assistance.
Indeed, We have granted you, [O Muhammad], al-Kawthar.
So pray to your Lord and sacrifice [to Him alone].
Indeed, your enemy is the one cut off.
Say, "O disbelievers,
I do not worship what you worship.
Nor are you worshippers of what I worship.
Nor will I be a worshipper of what you worship.
Nor will you be worshippers of what I worship.
For you is your religion, and for me is my religion."
When the victory of Allah has come and the conquest,

ayahs.arabic: وَرَأَيْتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِى دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًۭا
ayahs.transliteration: Wa ra-aitan naasa yadkhuloona fee deenil laahi afwajah
ayahs.translation: And you see the people entering into the religion of Allah in multitudes,

ayahs.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
ayahs.transliteration: Fa sab bih bihamdi rabbika was taghfir, innahu kaana tawwaaba
ayahs.translation: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of repentance.

ayahs.transliteration: Tab bat yadaa abee Lahabinw-wa tabb
ayahs.translation: May the hands of Abu Lahab be ruined, and ruined is he.

ayahs.arabic: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَمَا كَسَبَ
ayahs.transliteration: Maa aghna 'anhu maaluhu wa ma kasab
ayahs.translation: His wealth will not avail him or that which he gained.

ayahs.transliteration: Sa yas laa naran zaata lahab
ayahs.translation: He will [enter to] burn in a Fire of [blazing] flame
And his wife [as well] - the carrier of firewood.
Around her neck is a rope of [twisted] fiber.
Say, "He is Allah, [who is] One,
Allah, the Eternal Refuge.
He neither begets nor is born,
Nor is there to Him any equivalent."
Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak
From the evil of that which He created

ayahs.transliteration: Wa min sharri ghasiqin iza waqab
ayahs.translation: And from the evil of darkness when it settles
And from the evil of the blowers in knots

ayahs.transliteration: Wa min shar ri haasidin iza hasad
ayahs.translation: And from the evil of an envier when he envies."
Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind,
The Sovereign of mankind.
The God of mankind,
From the evil of the retreating whisperer -

ayahs.transliteration: Al lazee yuwas wisu fee sudoorin naas
ayahs.translation: Who whispers [evil] into the breasts of mankind -
From among the jinn and mankind."
